properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When life becomes a shattered dream That's slipping through my trembling hands I need to know that You are near To know You see each falling tear When there is no one else who understands

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I can't find the words to speak You hear the pain in each heart beat Before I even call to You In my deepest hour of need That's when You come and pour Your mercy on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your beauty shines Your love surrounds Where cries of brokenness Are found bring hope alive Help me believe And trust You one more time In brokenness You shine In brokenness You shine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let comfort be a living thing A river flowing from my grief Where thirsty souls can drink their fill And find in You their heart's release And through my sorrow show Your freedom and hope

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: How could I know when others said A word or two then walked away That You, the Man of Sorrows Would come near to stay You'll always stay

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I want to see Your beauty one more time In brokenness You shine In brokenness You shine
